name: Wanpy Dog Treats – Soft Chicken Jerky Strips 100g
description: Carefully oven-roasted to enhance flavour and preserve quality, Wanpy Chicken Jerky Strips provide a protein-rich snack suitable for daily rewarding, training sessions, or between-meal enjoyment. Their soft and chewy texture also makes them easy to break into smaller portions for controlled feeding. Designed to combine taste and nutrition, these premium dog snacks are a great addition to your dog’s daily routine while helping keep them happy and satisfied. Key Benefits Delicious oven-roasted chicken flavour Premium-quality dog snacks Made with high-quality ingredients Protein-rich recipe for dogs Soft, chewy texture dogs enjoy Easy to break into smaller portions Suitable for training and daily rewarding Produced to human consumption standards Storage Instructions Store in a cool and dry place.
